description: Style NoteLuxurious comfort is teamed with style in this pair of black shoes from gliders. Wear them with off-duty ensembles for optimal comfort, without compromising on style or with your regular office wear for a sharp look. Product DetailsSquare toed black shoes with lace-up fastening Synthetic upper, has reinforced overlay at the heel collar and stitched detailing across the box Soft footbed with slight padding around the mouth Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with diamond shaped lugs, has branding in the midfoot region and an upraised heel Comes with a shoe bag Material and CareSynthetic Wipe with a clean damp cloth when required
